subprograms.name: replace
subprograms.code:
function  replace (Self : in     Text.item;   Pattern : in String;
                                              By      : in String) return Text.item

documentation.description: If the replacement exceeds the capacity of 'Self', the result will be expanded.

subprograms.name: replace
subprograms.code:
procedure replace (Self : in out Text.item;   Pattern : in String;
                                              By      : in String)

documentation.description: 'Text.Error' will be raised if the replacement exceeds the capacity of 'Self'.
